chunks.text: Instructional UNIX home dirs and email are inaccessible | IRIS Skip to main content Skip to primary navigation Skip to primary sidebar Instructional UNIX home dirs and email are inaccessible The Instructional UNIX file server suffered a hardware fail

uctional UNIX file server suffered a hardware failure around 10am Saturday March 5th. Please see the Instructional web site for the latest updates . UPDATE [2005-03-08 09:12:14 | Kevin Mullally, ISG Manager] FYI, we have everything working again. St
